_comment: CANONICAL METRICS — single source of truth. Every surface (index.html, resume/, brands.json, kit, OG card) must match these numbers. Update here first, then sync surfaces. Conflicting receipts undermine the 'Receipts, not vanity' promise.

wavewarz.note: Testimonial quotes ($60k+) are the speaker's words and are not edited.

zao.community_display_rule: Always show the split: gated core vs total reached. Never collapse to one ambiguous number.
zao.members_rule: phrases.md bans citing specific holder counts in public copy

wins.farhack: Won the Snap category at FarHack 2026 with Zlank
